optional_improvements: Add one targeted UI automation test (or deterministic integration script) to verify priority sort order and filtered bulk-select behavior end-to-end, since current TEST stage is mostly static wiring/build validation.
Harden due-date sorting against invalid date strings by normalizing NaN timestamps to Infinity before compare to avoid edge-case unstable ordering.
summary: Implementation is correct and scope-aligned for Phase 2-3: study-plan prediction, priority sorter, vocabulary management enhancements, and statistics integration are all present, consistent with the goal, and build-verified. No blocking defects were identified; this is ready to ship.
